textByHashes.4d11f67d241e554528ba2fc19bc8b81b0d4fef90: Hello there, would you like to take part in the archery competition? It only costs 200 coins to enter.
textByHashes.879c32d3b49ca849078ed2a7c4a2d93b33d9d9d7: Great! That will be 200 coins then please.
textByHashes.b6f642579fa6a5a3c00eb359d3c9811c7ab87725: Never mind, come back when you've got enough.
textByHashes.d8a4daa2f0aeaead9f4a4238a01201efe127e8dd: You're given 10 shots at the targets, for each hit you will receive points. At the end you'll be awarded 1 ticket for every 10 points.
textByHashes.6e36277fce75752b00ce377121114e7417992303: The tickets can be exchanged for goods from our stores. Do you want to give it a go? Only 200 coins.
textByHashes.c3ea4f077eb2a29518b2b41ac8f203de73043f67: Hello again, do you need reminding of the rules?
textByHashes.d07794d565a9288fc3b093ab39eda6971fcf2300: The tickets can be exchanged for goods from our stores. Good luck!
textByHashes.e2b6dc6853e8eece91e392c1d8861c0e282a26bb: Glad to hear it, good luck!
textByHashes.ee43cad2da8194025dbe3fb1a2cd6227683811ad: So far your score is: 0. You haven't started yet.
textByHashes.5ea5d0676e1c771c624b9d1d1094795eda412840: So far your score is: . Not bad, keep going.
textByHashes.0d2b89657c8a6352fca44dd3a91f6fc92c2d047a: So far your score is: . You're pretty good, keep it up.
textByHashes.c6423648e0ce8775d04351c2d766f96142300541: Well done. Your score is: . For that score you will receive Archery tickets. Would you like to try again for another 200 coins?
